/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 2 D/CTS: 2/DNA/WS/11590/DTC/LF/RX/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PF500/X:PURSUANT TO RECOMMENDATION FROM PROBATION, THE DEFENDANT ISTO COMLPETE TWO MONTHS OF DRUG COUNSELING, IF HE IS UNSUCCESSFUL, THE DEFENDANT IS TO COMPLETE AN ADDITIONAL MONTH OF COUNSELING/PROBFINE/SECFEE/ICNA/COLLECT/SA2:AREA BOUNDED BY JONES, OFARRELL, TAYLOR AND EDDY STREETS/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT MAY GO TO ST ANTHONY'S WITHIN THE RESTRICTED AREA/OBEY/ACCEP/

/TEXT DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/X DEFENDANTPERSONALLY WAIVES RIGHT TO A PRELIMINARY HEARING TO BE HEARD WITHIN 10 COURT DAYS, BUT DOES NOT WAIVE RIGHT TO A PRELIMINARY HEARING TO BE COMPLETEDWITHIN 60 CALENDAR DAYS,/LD:06-01-09/987,2/OR/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO ABIDE BYALL SPR REQUIREMENTS/SA2:JONES, O'FARRELL, TAYLOR AND EDDY STREETS/SAORD/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:DA MTR HRG/X:COURT DO NOT FIND DEFENDANT IN VIOLATION OF PROBATION/REVSA:01-10-11/REIN ORIG TC/PROB EXT:06-17-12/

/CAL FILING OF DA MTR/X DEFENSE ORAL MOTION FOR OR IS DENIED/CONTD TS DATR/WIAMTR/S12 /TBH 10038025/PROB ADM REV/SHER/NB/DOP/
